content:
There may be instances where some of you may feel the need for a second chance to showcase your understanding and skills on certain assignments. Recognizing the importance of learning from our mistakes and continuously striving for improvement, I am pleased to announce an opportunity for assignment revision and resubmission.

Effective immediately, if you receive a grade on an assignment and feel that you could enhance your work based on the feedback provided, you are welcome to revise your assignment and resubmit it for re-evaluation. This initiative aims to encourage a growth mindset and ensure that you have every opportunity to excel and achieve the grades that reflect your true potential.

Here are some key points to consider for this process:

1. Eligibility: This opportunity is available for assignments where the original grade received is below a A (90%). Assignments that have scored 90% or above will be considered to have met the expected standard of excellence.

2. Process: To initiate a resubmission, please send an email to my attention within one week of receiving your graded assignment. In your email, kindly specify the areas you intend to improve upon and attach your revised assignment. It is imperative that your revisions are substantial and address the feedback provided, as mere cosmetic changes will not warrant a re-evaluation.
context: From document: If you need to reach me… — chunk 5 (chunk 5/7)
